main.tlua(2,25): error TS2307: Cannot find module './nosuchfile' or its corresponding type declarations.


==== main.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // A path-shaped specifier is not a Lua module name; it is an error.
    local missing = require("./nosuchfile");
                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2307: Cannot find module './nosuchfile' or its corresponding type declarations.
    
    // An unresolved dotted name falls back to the ambient overloads (any):
    // it may be a runtime-provided package or a C module.
    local maybe = require("no.such.module");
    local n: number = maybe;
    
    // A declaration file declares globals; it is not a chunk with a value, so
    // `defs` does not resolve to defs.d.tlua and stays the dynamic overload.
    local defs = require("defs");
    
    // A computed specifier keeps the dynamic overload.
    declare name: string;
    local dynamic = require(name);
    
==== defs.d.tlua (0 errors) ====
    declare helper: () => void;
